channel.title: Dokumentasi BigLedger – Marketplace
channel.description: Recent content in Marketplace on Dokumentasi BigLedger

item.title: Aplet Berkaitan EcomSync
item.description: Ecomsync Organization Applet Ecomsync - Organisation Applet - Cipta Syarikat Ecomsync - Organisation Applet : Cipta Cawangan Maya (Marketplace) Ecomsync - Organisation Applet - Marketplace : Konfigurasi Stok dan Pesanan Jualan mengikut Cawangan Ecomsync - Doc Item Maintenance Applet : Cipta Item Tunggal Ecomsync - Doc Item Maintenance Applet : Cipta Item Bundel Ecomsync - Doc Item Maintenance Applet : Cipta Item Berkelompok Ecomsync - Doc Item Maintenance Applet : Konfigurasi item tunggal/bundel ke marketplace Ecomsync - Doc Item Maintenance Applet : Konfigurasi item berkelompok ke marketplace Ecomsync - Doc Item Maintenance Applet : Konfigurasi baki stok dan pesanan jualan Ecomsync - Internal Sale Order Applet : Kemas kini status pesanan marketplace
